% Heartbeat logfile
% 1 	Time (sec)
% 2 	Robot name index
% 3 	Version
% 4 	State (0 = control is external to Teensy)
% 5 	Battery voltage (V)
% 6 	Teensy load (%)
% 7 	Board supply current (A)
% 8 	Used battery capacity (Wh) (never reset properly)
% 9 	Shutdown request.
% 10 	CPU temperature (Raspberry).
